# Ghost Tax
> AI Financial Control Plane for SaaS & AI Spend

Ghost Tax detects 12 types of hidden IT spending exposure using deterministic
analysis and organizational entropy modeling. One-time $490 analysis delivers
a board-ready Decision Pack in 48 hours. Zero system access required.

## Core Pages
- [Free Intel Scan](https://ghost-tax.com/intel): Run a free SaaS exposure scan
- [Platform](https://ghost-tax.com/platform): How Ghost Tax works (21-phase pipeline)
- [Pricing](https://ghost-tax.com/pricing): $490 one-time, no subscription
- [Methodology](https://ghost-tax.com/methodology): 12-type detection framework with entropy modeling
- [FAQ](https://ghost-tax.com/faq): Common questions
- [Case Studies](https://ghost-tax.com/case-studies): Client results

## Intel Benchmarks
- [SaaS & AI Cost Exposure](https://ghost-tax.com/intel-benchmarks/saas-ai-cost-exposure)
